arts.ttl: Who is Jack Moorhouse? Manchester United teenager in Ruben Amorim squad vs Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: The latest Man United news as Ruben Amorim names Jack Moorhouse in his matchday squad to play Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim confirms Man Utd's worst Amad fears have come true after injury blow
arts.sum: Manchester United continue to be hampered by injuries and Amad has joined those on the sidelines with Ruben Amorim admitting the forward will miss the rest of the season

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans turn on Daniel Levy as thousands gather for biggest protest yet against owners
arts.sum: Supporters call for Levy and ENIC to ‘get out of our club’ before Manchester United game

arts.sum: A luckless run of injuries forced Ruben Amorim into drastic action against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fan group protests against Levy and owners
arts.sum: A fan group called Change for Tottenham leads protests against the club's ownership before Sunday's game against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: 'I think so' - Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim breaks silence on Amad injury blow
arts.sum: Man United boss Ruben Amorim has been asked about the severity of Amad's ankle injury.

arts.ttl: Why two more Manchester United players are surprise absentees vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Man Utd face Tottenham in the Premier League on Sunday but they are without a dozen senior players and have picked one of the most inexperienced benches in their history.

arts.ttl: Spurs v Man Utd team news: Vicario + Maddison start, Amad out

arts.ttl: Tottenham welcome Vicario back after playing on broken ankle vs Man City
arts.sum: Italy international Guglielmo Vicario is back in the starting line-up for Tottenham for the first...

arts.ttl: Amorim gives up on €74m Man Utd flop as BIZARRE transfer link emerges
arts.sum: Given that Man Utd need to raise funds in the summer, there have been suggestions that they could look to offload Hojlund and he has now become the subject of a bizarre transfer link. Injury problems and a dreadful run of form recently led to him losing his place in Ruben Amorim's side, with the Portuguese head coach electing to play Kobbie Mainoo over his misfiring strikers.
